- **Sydney Water:** 150 mm sewer in 2.0 m wide drainage easement along southern boundary. Maintenance hole at rear corner. **Build-over likely requires Sydney Water assessment.**
- **Electricity:** Overhead line to street; underground service pit in footpath ÔÇö location marked Sheet 2.
- **NBN:** Pit in footpath, north of lot.","score":0.014925373134328358},{"document_id":"0713102e-1fda-5bb3-b953-b55265b02f14","chunk_id":"4bf36c0b-d02f-5ef0-bc42-0bcde370128f","document":"01-engagement-letter-harrison-clarke-studio.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/02-consultant/architect/01-engagement-letter-harrison-clarke-studio.md","page_or_section":"Scope of services","snippet":"## Scope of services

Our services comprise:

1. Concept and schematic design through to DA lodgement
2. Design development and construction documentation
3. Consultant briefing, appointment support, and coordination
4. Authority and certifier liaison (BASIX, Ku-ring-gai Council, principal certifier)
5. Head builder procurement ÔÇö preparation of tender documentation, evaluation of **two to three** invited builders, and a written recommendation to you
6. Contract administration during construction to practical completion, excluding Superintendent functions under the head contract unless later varied
7. Monthly owner progress reporting and milestone advice

**Exclusions** unless separately agreed: interior design beyond joinery schedule coordination; landscape design (we will brief a landscape consultant if required); geotechnical, survey, and specialist reports (we will coordinate appointments); extra tender rounds beyond one formal head-builder tender; legal advice.","score":0.014705882352941176},{"document_id":"27710665-8947-5669-8a50-2ea96e0d5e58","chunk_id":"a607d9e1-20bb-5dfb-9c1f-a9049ba9a2f3","document":"11-master-programme-chen-residence.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/_inbox/11-master-programme-chen-residence.md","page_or_section":"Stage 1 sub-milestones (extract)","snippet":"## Stage 1 sub-milestones (extract)

| Schematic design issue | 15 Jul 2026 | Brief locked |
| BASIX commitment | Aug 2026 | Schematic frozen |
| DA lodgement | **Sep 2026** | Owner approval of DA package |

6. Contract administration during construction to practical completion, excluding Superintendent functions under the head contract unless later varied
7. Monthly owner progress reporting and milestone advice
